name: Blendit
description: One-click Revit to Blender rendering. Extract the active 3D view and render it in Blender with a curated pipeline: twelve render looks from photoreal to stylised drawing (pen, sketch, hatch, yellowtrace, brown paper, blueprint), an interactive review session, and headless renders. Bridges Blender as a separate process (the Blender pipeline ships inside this extension).
author: lewismconte
